results.title: Canadian woman slaps teen over Trump clothing on Jersey Shore boardwalk; now charged and in ICE custody
results.description: A leftist Canadian woman allegedly slapped a teen who was wearing President Trump-branded clothing on the Jersey Shore over the Fourth of July weekend — before she was arrested and detained by immigration officials.

results.title: West Bengal Anti-Goonda Act challenged in Calcutta High Court on day of rollout
results.description: A public interest litigation (PIL) has been filed in the Calcutta High Court challenging West Bengal’s newly implemented Anti-Goonda Act on the very day it came into force. The petition seeks a stay on the law, while the state government has defended it as a measure to strengthen law and order and curb anti-social activities.

results.title: Democrats campaign in Palestine on East Texas Whistle-stop Tour
results.description: Four Democratic candidates campaigned in Palestine Wednesday as part of a Whistle-stop Tour through East Texas to build support in state and national elections. All four candidates, Chelsey Hockett (D-Terrell), Holly Taylor (D-Austin), Bobby Tillman (D-LaRue) and Jeff Chavez (D-Palestine)...
